description: Conversation-derived trace for the current trr productization thread

payload.text: Build a mature cross-model recovery tool so coding agents do not redo work after context compaction or restart.
Do not write user API keys or base URLs into repository-visible files.
Keep host integration general across users, shells, and environments.
Claude should use official compaction hooks; Codex still needs wrapper and guard fallback because there is no documented public compaction hook.

items.text: Verify official host behavior for Claude and Codex compaction handling
Implement shell wrapper, guard shims, Claude hooks, docs, and smoke coverage
Run real host validation for Codex and Claude using the current project thread as test material

payload.nextAction: Run broader real-session validation for wrapped Codex and hooked Claude, then tighten remaining host-specific gaps.

payload.summary: Rewrote final readiness around host-specific product paths and remaining external validation gaps.
Captured official Claude and Codex host behavior differences and integration consequences.
Added official Claude hook installation and runtime handling for session start, compaction, and Bash replay guard decisions.
Local smoke passed through fallback validation in this environment
